steps.title: Use the mutual exchange
steps.content: The sentence describes ectomycorrhizae as mutually beneficial relationships and a symbiotic exchange. The tree provides carbon to the fungus, so the blank must describe the fungus giving a benefit back to the tree by helping it absorb nitrogen.

steps.title: Reject hostile or unrelated verbs
steps.content: Choice A means responding too strongly, Choice C means responding to harm with harm, and Choice D means departing from a course. None fits a beneficial exchange. The precise verb means returning a benefit in kind within the symbiotic relationship. The answer is B.
